title: Editas Medicine Inc (EDIT) Stock Forecast & Price Target
text: Editas Medicine (EDIT) Consensus Estimates and Stock Forecast. Current Stock Price and Market Data: NASDAQ listed stock trading in micro-cap range. Recent price action: $2.50-$3.50 range typical for 2026. Market sentiment: Mixed given clinical stage status and execution risks. Earnings Expectations: Current consensus reflects continued operating losses typical of clinical-stage biotech companies. EPS forecasts increasingly negative as company invests heavily in R&D. Revenue projections: Declining as Vertex partnership payments diminish without new major deals. Cash Runway: Critical metric for biotech investors. Company guidance: Funds into Q2-Q3 2027. Analyst consensus cost assumptions: Monthly burn rate estimated $20-30M range based on recent results. Growth Projections: Longer-term value creation contingent on: EDIT-401 clinical success and eventual commercialization. Successful partnering of reni-cel program. Additional program development success. Profitability Timeline: Unlikely to reach profitability before 2030+ under most scenarios. Depends on multiple clinical successes and commercialization achievements. Risk Assessment: Higher risk due to clinical development uncertainties and execution challenges typical of biotech sector.
